query:
SELECT id, displayName, whatsappName, currentStreak, longestStreak, totalPoints, daysComplete, livesRemaining, ghostLifeUsed, updatedAt FROM participants WHERE LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(displayName,''),' ',COALESCE(whatsappName,''))) LIKE '%nay%';
SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, dl.dayNumber, dl.dayComplete, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt, dl.createdAt, dl.updatedAt FROM participants p JOIN daily_logs dl ON dl.participantId = p.id WHERE LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.displayName,''),' ',COALESCE(p.whatsappName,''))) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber;

SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, dl.dayNumber, dl.dayComplete, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt, dl.createdAt, dl.updatedAt FROM participants p JOIN daily_logs dl ON dl.participantId = p.id WHERE LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.displayName,''),' ',COALESCE(p.whatsappName,''))) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber;
